---
title: "broadcast_ignoring"
generated: true
description: "Broadcast two tensors, ignoring the axis or axes specified."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:broadcast_ignoring -->
```python
broadcast_ignoring(x: Shaped[Array, ...], y: Shaped[Array, ...], axis: Union[int, Tuple[int, ...]]) -> Tuple[Shaped[Array, ...], Shaped[Array, ...]]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:broadcast_ignoring -->
Broadcast two tensors, ignoring the axis or axes specified.

This can be useful, for instance, when concatenating tensors along
the ignored axis.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:broadcast_ignoring -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Shaped[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `y` | `Shaped[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `axis` | `Union[int, Tuple[int, ...]]` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[Shaped[Array, ...], Shaped[Array, ...]]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
